metadata.name: EmploidAI Support Assistant
metadata.description: Form-based support ticket intake, AI triage, Collections record creation and Gmail notification flow

options.label: Start Button
options.name: startButton
options.description: Start the conversation with start button

options.label: Chat Input
options.name: chatInput
options.description: Start the conversation with chat input

options.label: Form Input
options.name: formInput
options.description: Start the workflow with form inputs

inputParams.label: Form Description
inputParams.name: formDescription
inputParams.placeholder: Complete all fields below to continue

inputParams.label: Form Input Types
inputParams.name: formInputTypes
inputParams.description: Specify the type of form input

array.label: Variable Name
array.name: name
array.placeholder: Variable name for the input (must be camel case)
array.description: Variable name must be camel case. For example: firstName, lastName, etc.

inputParams.label: Ephemeral Memory
inputParams.name: startEphemeralMemory
inputParams.description: Start fresh for every execution without past chat history

inputParams.name: startState
inputParams.description: Runtime state during the execution of the workflow

inputParams.label: Persist State
inputParams.name: startPersistState
inputParams.description: Persist the state in the same session

inputs.formDescription: Fill in the fields below. The flow validates setup, classifies the issue, creates a Collections ticket record and sends an internal Gmail notification.

inputParams.label: Input Variables
inputParams.name: customFunctionInputVariables
inputParams.description: Input variables can be used in the function with prefix $. For example: $foo

inputParams.label: Javascript Function
inputParams.name: customFunctionJavascriptFunction
inputParams.description: The function to execute. Must return a string or an object that can be converted to a string.

inputParams.label: Update Flow State
inputParams.name: customFunctionUpdateState
inputParams.description: Update runtime state during the execution of the workflow

inputParams.description: Values to compare

data.label: AI Triage LLM
data.name: llmAgentflow
data.description: Large language models to analyze user-provided inputs and generate responses

inputParams.label: Enable Memory
inputParams.name: llmEnableMemory
inputParams.description: Enable memory for the conversation thread

options.label: All Messages
options.name: allMessages
options.description: Retrieve all messages from the conversation

options.label: Window Size
options.name: windowSize
options.description: Uses a fixed window size to surface the last N messages

options.label: Conversation Summary Buffer
options.name: conversationSummaryBuffer
options.description: Summarize conversations once token limit is reached. Default to 2000

inputParams.label: Window Size
inputParams.name: llmMemoryWindowSize
inputParams.description: Uses a fixed window size to surface the last N messages

inputParams.label: Max Token Limit
inputParams.name: llmMemoryMaxTokenLimit
inputParams.description: Summarize conversations once token limit is reached. Default to 2000

inputParams.label: Input Message
inputParams.name: llmUserMessage
inputParams.description: Add an input message as user message at the end of the conversation

inputParams.label: JSON Structured Output
inputParams.name: llmStructuredOutput
inputParams.description: Instruct the LLM to give output in a JSON structured schema

array.label: JSON Schema
array.name: jsonSchema
array.description: JSON schema for the structured output

inputParams.label: Update Flow State
inputParams.name: llmUpdateState
inputParams.description: Update runtime state during the execution of the workflow

llmMessages.content: You are an internal support triage assistant. Normalize the support request into structured fields only. Do not invent facts. Keep the summary short, operational and useful for an internal support queue. Consider both the user-provided urgency and the message content when deciding priority. In v1 you are not writing a customer reply. You are only enriching the internal ticket.

llmStructuredOutput.enumValues: bug, billing, access, feature_request, general_question, account, integration, other

llmStructuredOutput.description: Team that should likely own the next step

data.label: Create Ticket Record
data.name: collectionsAgentflow
data.description: Manage Collections data models, records, fields, relations and views from Agent Flow.

inputParams.label: Mode
inputParams.name: mode
inputParams.description: Select the Collections operation to perform.

inputParams.label: Collection ID
inputParams.name: collectionId
inputParams.description: Target collection identifier.

rendererConfig.manualHelperText: Raw collection ID or variable girebilirsin.
rendererConfig.selectInfoText: Data store icinden collection sec. Collection ID otomatik doldurulur.
rendererConfig.summaryInfoText: Data alaninda Field Values bolumunu kullan. Secilen collection icin inputlar orada cikar.

inputParams.label: Data
inputParams.name: data
inputParams.description: Record payload as JSON object. In create record mode, field inputs can generate this automatically.

rendererConfig.title: Field Inputs
rendererConfig.helperText: Field key olarak {exampleFieldName} kullanilir. Buraya girdigin degerlerden `Data` JSON otomatik uretilir.
rendererConfig.emptySelectionText: Once collection sec, burada field bazli inputlar acilir.
rendererConfig.emptyWritableText: Bu collection icin yazilabilir field yok.
